positive: A stylized, neo-geometric arrangement of a nocturnal cityscape viewed through crystalline elements. The scene features stylized, interconnected lines forming bridges and buildings, rendered in deep indigo, cosmic lavender, and glowing neon cyan accents. A central, abstract crescent moon motif anchors the composition. The overall style is a blend of Art Deco geometry and vaporwave synthwave aesthetic, giving it strong silhouettes and high contrast. Composition is radial and balanced, designed for centered placement on fabric. Minimalist, vector-illustration feel with a polished, enamel-like sheen. Crisp lines, high contrast, symmetrical composition, abstract art.
